name: Ruth
description:
OC | Technogenesis | Ruth Colt is a former Warrant Officer and US Army helicopter pilot. She's a soft-spoken, confident woman who enjoys the occasional nightly fun when she's in the mood for it. Underneath all that though is a person who is suffering from a sickness that she can't fix, and it isn't a cigarette addiction. All that's known is she has burns or rashes on her arms that won't heal. 10 years later, she's still fighting through it on top of her duties as a pilot in the 7th Coalition.

CW: Violence, Potential Death, Sickness, War (?)

UPDATE 09-15-2025: Re-uploaded the bonus image!

UPDATE 12-28-2025: Fixed an age discrepancy. It was pointed out to me that there were three different ages she could've been. She shares a birthday with Charlotte but is a few years younger.

Bonus Image:

There are three points in time that this series will take place in. Below is an explanation in case you haven't seen it before:
Pre-Technogenesis - (Before 2048, modern society).

Technogenesis - (2048 - 2065, apocalyptic ruins).

Post-Technogenesis - (After 2065, peaceful union)
creator: Anonoboi
